creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
For some reason calibre is not finding a table it expects to find in the sqlite DB it uses for metadata.

This looks like a question for the actual developer. Would you mind filing a bug report at the main calibre bug tracker [1] and add a link here in the See also section?

What is the output when trying to open this library before trying to restore it?


Also, when you say that windows version has no problems with the same library, you mean exactly the same library copied (via an archive for example) to windows and pointing calibre at it, or you mean a library with the same content but generated on windows?

Are you accessing the same library from different machines? In such a case, maybe one of them updated the DB while some other accessed it with an older version? Or maybe different machines accessed using different sqlite versions? If that's the case (accessing same DB from machines with different OS//library/calibre versions) I don't think this is really a supported scenario.

Another thing that is not supported by sqlite DBs is NFS. While accessing sqlite DBs via NFS (or other networked filesystems) may work most of the time it is not supported and sooner or later will cause problems.

I'd also ask you if you could send me the sqlite DB file to look at it, but I would understand if you refused on privacy basis.


[1] https://bugs.launchpad.net/calibre
